testcase.classname: Plugin sharedb with sharedb >=1 (1.0.0) without configuration
testcase.name: should do automatic instrumentation

testcase.classname: Plugin sharedb with sharedb >=1 (1.0.0) without configuration
testcase.name: should be compatible with existing middleware

testcase.classname: Plugin sharedb with sharedb >=1 (1.0.0) without configuration
testcase.name: should sanitize queries

testcase.classname: Plugin sharedb with sharedb >=1 (1.0.0) without configuration
testcase.name: should gracefully handle an invalid or unsupported message action

testcase.classname: Plugin sharedb with sharedb >=1 (1.0.0) without configuration
testcase.name: should gracefully handle a message without data

testcase.classname: Plugin sharedb with sharedb >=1 (1.0.0) without configuration
testcase.name: should propagate the parent tracing context

testcase.classname: Plugin sharedb with sharedb >=1 (1.0.0) with configuration
testcase.name: should support receive and reply hooks

testcase.classname: Plugin sharedb with sharedb >=1 (1.0.0) when the datastore throws an exception
testcase.name: should do automatic instrumentation & handle errors

testcase.classname: Plugin sharedb with sharedb >=1 (5.2.2) without configuration
testcase.name: should do automatic instrumentation

testcase.classname: Plugin sharedb with sharedb >=1 (5.2.2) without configuration
testcase.name: should be compatible with existing middleware

testcase.classname: Plugin sharedb with sharedb >=1 (5.2.2) without configuration
testcase.name: should sanitize queries

testcase.classname: Plugin sharedb with sharedb >=1 (5.2.2) without configuration
testcase.name: should gracefully handle an invalid or unsupported message action

testcase.classname: Plugin sharedb with sharedb >=1 (5.2.2) without configuration
testcase.name: should gracefully handle a message without data

testcase.classname: Plugin sharedb with sharedb >=1 (5.2.2) without configuration
testcase.name: should propagate the parent tracing context

testcase.classname: Plugin sharedb with sharedb >=1 (5.2.2) with configuration
testcase.name: should support receive and reply hooks

testcase.classname: Plugin sharedb with sharedb >=1 (5.2.2) when the datastore throws an exception
testcase.name: should do automatic instrumentation & handle errors
